Oscillators

ScQubitsMimic includes lightweight oscillator models that share the same spectral interface as the qubit and circuit types.

ScQubitsMimic.Oscillator — Type
Oscillator(; E_osc, truncated_dim=10)

Quantum harmonic oscillator with frequency E_osc (in GHz). Hamiltonian: H = E_osc * â†â

source
ScQubitsMimic.KerrOscillator — Type
KerrOscillator(; E_osc, K, truncated_dim=10)

Kerr (anharmonic) oscillator with frequency E_osc and Kerr nonlinearity K (GHz). Hamiltonian: H = E_osc * â†â - K * â†â(â†â - 1)

source
ScQubitsMimic.annihilation_operator — Function

Return the annihilation operator â for an Oscillator.

source
ScQubitsMimic.creation_operator — Function

Return the creation operator â† for an Oscillator.

source
ScQubitsMimic.number_operator — Function

Return the number operator â†â for an Oscillator.

source
